name: jadx
summary: Command line and GUI tools for producing Java source code from Android Dex and Apk files

documentation.readme: Command line and GUI tools for producing Java source code from Android Dex and Apk files
usage_sections: decompile Dalvik bytecode to Java code from APK, dex, aar, aab and zip files
decode AndroidManifest.xml and other resources from resources.arsc
view decompiled code with highlighted syntax
smali debugger, check wiki page for setup and usage

arguments.name: -a
arguments.description: - list available plugins from jadx-plugins-list (aka marketplace)

arguments.name: --add-debug-lines
arguments.description: - add comments with debug line numbers if available

arguments.name: -alias
arguments.description: rename class alias, values: [yes, no], default: yes

arguments.name: -alias-source-dbg
arguments.description: rename class alias from SourceDebugExtension, values: [yes, no], default: no

arguments.name: -args
arguments.description: rename function arguments, values: [yes, no], default: yes

arguments.name: --available
arguments.description: - list available plugins from jadx-plugins-list (aka marketplace)

arguments.name: --call-graph
arguments.description: - save app call graph in format: 'dot' or 'json', default: none

arguments.name: --cfg
arguments.description: - save methods control flow graph to dot file

arguments.name: -checksum
arguments.description: verify dex file checksum before load, values: [yes, no], default: yes

arguments.name: -class
arguments.description: add data class modifier, values: [yes, no], default: yes

arguments.name: --comments-level
arguments.description: - set code comments level, values: error, warn, info, debug, user-only, none, default: info

arguments.name: --config
arguments.description: - load configuration from file, <config-ref> can be:

arguments.name: -convert
arguments.description: Convert .class, .jar and .aar files to dex

arguments.name: -d
arguments.description: - output directory

arguments.name: --decompilation-mode
arguments.description: - code output mode:

arguments.name: --deobf
arguments.description: - activate deobfuscation

arguments.name: --deobf-cfg-file
arguments.description: - deobfuscation mappings file used for JADX auto-generated names (in the JOBF file format), default: same dir and name as input file with '.jobf' extension

arguments.name: --deobf-cfg-file-mode
arguments.description: - set mode for handling the JADX auto-generated names' deobfuscation map file:

arguments.name: --deobf-max
arguments.description: - max length of name, renamed if longer, default: 64

arguments.name: --deobf-min
arguments.description: - min length of name, renamed if shorter, default: 3

arguments.name: --deobf-res-name-source
arguments.description: - better name source for resources:

arguments.name: --deobf-whitelist
arguments.description: - space separated list of classes (full name) and packages (ends with '.*') to exclude from deobfuscation, default: android.support.v4.* android.support.v7.* android.support.v4.os.* android.support.an

arguments.name: -desugar
arguments.description: use desugar in d8, values: [yes, no], default: no

arguments.name: --disable
arguments.description: - disable plugin with pluginId

arguments.name: --disable-plugins
arguments.description: - comma separated list of plugin ids to disable

arguments.name: -dr
arguments.description: - output directory for resources

arguments.name: -ds
arguments.description: - output directory for sources

arguments.name: -e
arguments.description: - save as gradle project (set '--export-gradle-type' to 'auto')

arguments.name: --enable
arguments.description: - enable plugin with pluginId

arguments.name: --escape-unicode
arguments.description: - escape non latin characters in strings (with \u)

arguments.name: --export-gradle
arguments.description: - save as gradle project (set '--export-gradle-type' to 'auto')

arguments.name: --export-gradle-type
arguments.description: - Gradle project template for export:

arguments.name: -f
arguments.description: - set '--decompilation-mode' to 'fallback' (deprecated)

arguments.name: --fallback
arguments.description: - set '--decompilation-mode' to 'fallback' (deprecated)

arguments.name: --fs-case-sensitive
arguments.description: - treat filesystem as case sensitive, false by default

arguments.name: -h
arguments.description: - print this help

arguments.name: --help
arguments.description: - print this help

arguments.name: -i
arguments.description: - install plugin with locationId

arguments.name: -input
arguments.description: Load .dex and .apk files

arguments.name: --install
arguments.description: - install plugin with locationId

arguments.name: --install-jar
arguments.description: install plugin from jar file

arguments.name: --integer-format
arguments.description: - how integers are displayed:

arguments.name: -l
arguments.description: - list installed plugins

arguments.name: -level
arguments.description: Android API level, default: 27

arguments.name: --list
arguments.description: - list installed plugins

arguments.name: --list-all
arguments.description: - list all plugins including bundled and dropins

arguments.name: --list-versions
arguments.description: - fetch latest versions of plugin from locationId (will download all artefacts, limited to 10)

arguments.name: --log-level
arguments.description: - set log level, values: quiet, progress, error, warn, info, debug, default: progress

arguments.name: -m
arguments.description: - code output mode:

arguments.name: -mappings
arguments.description: various mappings support

arguments.name: --mappings-mode
arguments.description: - set mode for handling the deobfuscation mapping file:

arguments.name: --mappings-path
arguments.description: - deobfuscation mappings file or directory. Allowed formats: Tiny and Tiny v2 (both '.tiny'), Enigma (.mapping) or Enigma directory

arguments.name: -metadata
arguments.description: Use kotlin.Metadata annotation for code generation

arguments.name: --no-debug-info
arguments.description: - disable debug info parsing and processing

arguments.name: --no-finally
arguments.description: - don't extract finally block

arguments.name: --no-imports
arguments.description: - disable use of imports, always write entire package name

arguments.name: --no-inline-anonymous
arguments.description: - disable anonymous classes inline

arguments.name: --no-inline-kotlin-lambda
arguments.description: - disable inline for Kotlin lambdas

arguments.name: --no-inline-methods
arguments.description: - disable methods inline

arguments.name: --no-move-inner-classes
arguments.description: - disable move inner classes into parent

arguments.name: --target
arguments.description: Target host, IP, MAC, or URL the tool operates on.

examples: java-convert: Convert .class, .jar and .aar files to dex
kotlin-metadata: Use kotlin.Metadata annotation for code generation

chain_examples.note: Shares attack_surface+phase_hint+tag with zynon/LdapRelayScan (score=10); pair in the chain planner.
Shares attack_surface+phase_hint+tag with swisskyrepo/PayloadsAllTheThings (score=10); pair in the chain planner.
Shares attack_surface+phase_hint+tag with skelsec/msldap (score=10); pair in the chain planner.
Phase 3: same attack_surface=['web', 'ad'] and phase_hint='any'; this entry chains with adjacent tools in the same family. The full set of siblings is enumerated by the catalog search index.
Phase 4: same attack_surface=['web', 'ad'] and phase_hint='any'; this entry chains with adjacent tools in the same family. The full set of siblings is enumerated by the catalog search index.
Phase 5: same attack_surface=['web', 'ad'] and phase_hint='any'; this entry chains with adjacent tools in the same family. The full set of siblings is enumerated by the catalog search index.

documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'any' phase against surfaces [web, ad] in the Dex to Java decompiler category. Fits when the engagement needs: Command line and GUI tools for producing Java source code from Android Dex and Apk files.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool based on upstream description: Command line and GUI tools for producing Java source code from Android Dex and Apk files.
documentation.how_to_use: Install/setup: brew install jadx; git clone https://github.com/skylot/jadx.git. Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `sudo pacman -S jadx`. Further invocations from upstream: `flatpak install flathub com.github.skylot.jadx`; `./gradlew dist`. Command line and GUI tools for producing Java source code from Android Dex and Apk files.

trust.warning: Attribution/index entry only. Audit provenance, code, releases, and licence before use. Operates against the operator's own authorized scope only.

use_cases: Use as a candidate tool in the chain planner; review provenance before use.
